headline: American Airlines Sinks 5%, United Falls 4%, Delta and JetBlue Slip 3% as Crude Oil Jumps
summary: Shares of American Airlines Group (NASDAQ:AAL) are down 5% in midday trading Wednesday, leading a broad airline selloff. United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL) shares are off 4%, while Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) stock and JetBlue Airways (NASDAQ:JBLU) stock are each down 3%. The catalyst is a sharp jump in crude oil prices.
